run.name: CI

head_commit.message:
feat(vmx): dump GPA/GLA context for EPT misconfiguration exits

Expose the VMCS guest-physical and guest-linear address fields for EPT misconfiguration exits and log them together with the exit qualification. This makes the next EPT_MISCONFIG actionable without having to reproduce the fault under a debugger.

run.display_title: feat(vmx): dump GPA/GLA context for EPT misconfiguration exits

run.name: CI

head_commit.message:
chore(vmx): include raw instruction bytes in decode logging

Augment the Intel-format VMX instruction decode warning so bring-up logs retain the raw bytes that produced the disassembly. This makes it easier to diagnose unexpected exits without reproducing the exact decode path under a debugger.

run.display_title: chore(vmx): include raw instruction bytes in decode logging
